pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Amazon Machine Learning (Amazon ML) is a robust machine learning platform that allows software developers to build and train predictive applications and host those applications in a scalable AWS cloud solution.
/See:/ <http://docs.aws.amazon.com/machine-learning/latest/APIReference/Welcome.html AWS API Reference>
/Warning:/ This is an experimental preview release which is still under heavy development and not intended for public consumption, caveat emptor!
